title: AmbienceImproved
description: This mod improves the ambiance of Minecraft by x5!
body:
# Welcome to the mod that literally improves minecraft ambiance by x5!

This mod adds the following things:
- Duckweed
- Wildflowers
- Fallen leaves
- Straw Hat
- New types of flowers
- New types of food & crops
- Pinecones
- Cracked dirt & mud
- 1 Biome
- An Anchient plant
- The forgotten cyan rose
- Frost
- And a tea

**Hope you enjoy the mod (:**
